QA Junior Engineer (Playwright)
BlueOrbit Software - Remote, Brazil

We are looking for a QA Junior Engineer to join our web platform team. You will write and
maintain end-to-end tests with Playwright and TypeScript, create test cases for new features,
execute regression testing before releases and report bugs with clear evidence.

Requirements: basic knowledge of JavaScript or TypeScript, Git, test case writing, bug report
skills and intermediate English for documentation.

Nice to have: Playwright or Cypress exposure, API testing with Postman, CI/CD basics with
GitHub Actions.

This is a junior-friendly position with mentorship from senior QA engineers.
